nasb.text: In the year of King Uzziah’s death I saw the Lord sitting on a throne, lofty and exalted, with the train of His robe filling the temple.

esv.text: In the year that King Uzziah died I saw the Lord sitting upon a throne, high and lifted up; and the train of his robe filled the temple.

cnv.text: 烏西雅王去世那年，我看見主坐在高高的寶座上，他的衣裳垂下，充滿聖殿。

ccb.text: 乌西雅王驾崩那年，我看见主坐在高高的宝座上，衣袍下垂，覆盖了圣殿。

csbs.text: 乌西雅王驾崩的那年，我看见主坐在至高至尊的宝座上，他衣袍的下摆遮满了圣殿。
